items.description: This is a detailed vinyl figure set from Weta Workshop's MINI EPICS line, featuring Vecna and Eleven from the 4th season of Stranger Things. The figures are designed to capture the essence of each character with unique stylization and expressive details. Vecna is depicted in a grotesque, monstrous form with decaying skin and distorted limbs, while Eleven is shown in her iconic white top and shorts. Both figures are sculpted to evoke nostalgia and add personality to any collection.

Eleven, sculpted by Weta Workshop 3D Sculptor, Jorgelina Yeme

items.title: London Music Works Stranger Things (original Soundtrack) Vinyl Lp
items.note: The synth that follows you down the driveway.
items.alt_text: Stranger Things Music from the Upside Down vinyl record cover featuring a red bicycle in a dark, surreal forest.
items.description: This is a vinyl record soundtrack for the popular series Stranger Things, performed by London Music Works. The soundtrack features music composed by Kyle Dixon and Michael Stein, known for their synth-heavy style reminiscent of 1980s artists. The vinyl itself is red and blue colored, adding a unique visual element to the listening experience.
key_features: The Stranger Things original soundtracks are composed by Kyle Dixon and Michael Stein of the electronic band Survive.

They make extensive use of synthesizers in homage to 1980s artists and film composers including Jean-Michel Jarre, Tangerine Dream, Vangelis, Goblin, John Carpenter, Giorgio Moroder, and Fabio Frizzi.

Album Tracks: Stranger Things, Kids, This Isn't You, Eleven, Eulogy, The First Lie, Soldiers, Choices, Boys and Girls, The Fist I Love You, The Silver Cat Feeds, Aftermath, What's the Internet, You're the Heart, Teens, Letter to Willy, You Have Already Lost, Season 4 End Scene

items.title: Kate Bush: Hounds Of Love - 2018 Remaster 180gm Black Vinyl
items.note: The song that pulls you back. Keep it within reach.
items.alt_text: A woman lying down with two dogs on a purple blanket or background. The image has decorative purple text in corners saying 'Kate Bush' and 'Hounds Of Love'. The woman's face is blurred.
items.description: Experience Kate Bush's fifth studio album, "Hounds of Love," newly pressed on high-quality 180gm black vinyl from the 2018 remasters. This reissue features new lacquers cut by Bernie Grundman and overseen by mastering engineer James Guthrie. The packaging includes a spot varnish sleeve, obi strips with pressing dates, and resealable poly-bag liners with a 'Fish People Reissue' sticker. Pressed at the renowned Record Industry plant in the Netherlands, this edition celebrates the album that achieved Double Platinum certification in the UK.
key_features: 2018 Remaster by Bernie Grundman (supervised by James Guthrie)
Includes obi strip with pressing date
Resealable poly-sleeve with 'Fish People Reissue' sticker
Album content includes tracks like 'Running Up That Hill (A Deal With God)' and 'Cloudbusting'

items.title: Dungeons And Dragons 2024 Player's Handbook
items.note: The campaign starts here. Ten hours minimum, no dinner breaks.
items.alt_text: Cover of the Dungeons & Dragons 2024 Player's Handbook book.
items.description: This is the 2024 revised and expanded Player's Handbook for Dungeons & Dragons. It includes updated rules for character creation and advancement, exploration, combat, equipment, and spells. The book features new art and a refreshed design, with expanded options for creating characters, including twelve classes, 48 subclasses, and 10 species. It also includes nearly 400 spells and new weapon masteries for enhanced combat versatility, as well as a new tools and crafting system.
key_features: The biggest Player’s Handbook in Dungeons & Dragons history, revised and expanded to reflect ten years of feedback from the D&D community
The perfect start to your D&D adventures, with updated learn to play and character creation sections, plus an alphabetized Rules Glossary makes finding rules information a snap
Expanded ways to create any character with twelve classes, 48 subclasses, and 10 species; customize your character’s origins with 10 species, 16 backgrounds, and 75 feats
Cover-to-cover brand new art and a refreshed look and feel make every page a joy to experience
Nearly 400 spells, including all-new additions to your arsenal
New Weapon Masteries that give players greater versatility in combat
New Tools & Crafting System that gives you new ways to utilize your tools and craft new items while adventuring

items.alt_text: Set of blue polyhedral dice with gold numbers
items.description: A stunning 7-piece polyhedral dice set meticulously carved from natural Lapis Lazuli stone. This set features a deep, rich blue color with natural accents and swirls characteristic of the gemstone. The numbering is elegantly inscribed in a unique gold-colored Elvenkind Font. Due to the natural stone material, users are advised to avoid rolling these dice on extremely hard surfaces like metal or concrete to prevent damage, suggesting the use of a dice tray for protection.
key_features: Made from natural Lapis Lazuli stone
Set includes multiple polyhedral dice shapes
Requires careful handling; avoid hard rolling surfaces

items.title: Cobra 37-mile Walkie Talkie Ip67 Waterproof Floating Two-way Radio 2-pack 22 Channels (acxt 1037r Flt)
items.note: Channel six, code red. Over means over.
items.alt_text: Two Cobra 37-Mile Walkie Talkies in black and orange floating style with included charging cable.
items.description: Cobra ACXT1037R FLT IP67 Waterproof Floating 2-Way Radio (2-Pack) The Cobra ACXT1037R FLT is the ultimate walkie-talkie for tough environments  offering superior communication and durability. With an impressive 37-mile range and a waterproof (IP67) rating  this radio is designed to float and withstand harsh conditions  making it ideal for outdoor adventures. Stay connected with 22 channels and 121 privacy codes  ensuring secure and private conversations. It also provides instant access to NOAA weather alerts  so you re always prepared for changing conditions. The innovative Rewind-Say-Again® feature allows you to replay the last 20 seconds of incoming audio  while the Burp feature expels water from the speaker if submerged. Built for reliability  the ACXT1037R FLT is the perfect tool for clear communication  no matter where you are.

items.title: Bushnell Lpx650 Walkie Talkie Radio 2 Pack - Black/orange
items.note: Channel six, code red. Over means over.
items.alt_text: Bushnell LPX650 two-way radio with accessories and packaging
items.description: This is a two-pack set of Bushnell LPX650 walkie-talkies, described as an Open Box item that functions like new but may have minor cosmetic imperfections. These rugged two-way radios feature an IP67 waterproof/dustproof and shock-resistant design, capable of two watts of power for up to 42 miles of range. They come pre-programmed with 48 channels with privacy codes to reduce interference. The package includes two radios, rechargeable batteries, belt clips, and a USB-C charging dock, though they can also operate using standard AA alkaline batteries (not included).
key_features: Two watts of power for up to 42 miles (68 kilometers) of range
Shock resistant up to 1.5 meter drops
Includes 2 walkie talkies, 6 rechargeable batteries, 2 belt clips, and 1 USB-C charging dock

items.description: Energizer Tactical Flashlights  375 Lumen  Durable Metal LED Flashlights  Batteries Included  3 Pack Bring along a powerful mini flashlight with this pack of Energizer Tactical Flashlights. This LED tactical flashlight delivers optimal brightness in a compact form. Stow one in your vehicle for roadside assistance or in your backpack with your other tactical accessories for outdoor adventures. Up to 4x brighter than standard LED technology  this small flashlight puts off a 590-foot beam to see far ahead. Manual focus lets you adjust from a wide beam to a spot beam just by pulling out the lens  delivering the right light for everyday tasks. Modes for High  Low and Strobe let you adjust the intensity. Made from metal  this durable emergency flashlight features a rear push button for easy use. With an included lanyard  it s simple to hang this pack of LED flashlights wherever you want bright light within reach. Trust in Energizer for reliable performance in any situation.

items.description: Illuminate your holidays and outdoor spaces with the DEWENWILS C9 LED Christmas String Lights. This 33.3ft set features 50 super bright, multi-color LED bulbs, offering a vibrant, flicker-free glow perfect for Christmas trees, patios, gardens, and parties. Designed for convenience and durability, these lights are waterproof for outdoor use, feature detachable diamond-shape caps, and allow for end-to-end connection of up to 90 strands. They are energy efficient, consuming only 2.4W total, and boast a long lifespan of up to 50,000 hours. The green, sturdy three-cord wiring is tangle-free and blends easily into foliage. This set includes 2 spare fuses for peace of mind.

items.note: Eggos at home. Leave a box in the woods for a friend.
items.alt_text: Ninja countertop waffle maker in black with silver metal plate and top handle visible
items.description: This is a gently used Ninja BW1001 NeverStick PRO Belgian Waffle Maker, presented in a sleek black and silver finish. Designed for optimal waffle creation, it features a unique vertical design for even heating and consistently perfect results. Whether you prefer soft and fluffy or delightfully crispy waffles, utilize the 5 shade settings to achieve your desired texture. The spacious, nonstick interior accommodates thick, 1-inch Belgian waffles. It even includes an exclusive specialty setting ideal for high-sugar batters like brownies or cake mixes. The unit comes complete with a precision-pour cup for easy batter measuring and pouring, along with a chef-curated recipe guide. Audible and visual alerts notify you when your waffle is perfectly done, eliminating guesswork. Please note that as a gently used item, it may exhibit minor signs of use like small scratches or stains, and packaging may be imperfect or missing the original box.

5 adjustable shade settings (from soft to crispy)
1-inch deep interior for thick, fluffy Belgian waffles

Includes Precision-Pour Cup for easy batter measuring

items.title: Jensen Portable Stereo Cassette Player With Am/fm Radio + Sport Earbuds (yellow)
items.note: Side A saves lives. Ask Max.
items.alt_text: Yellow portable stereo cassette player with AM/FM radio and sport earbuds.
items.description: The JENSEN SCR-75 Stereo Cassette Player with AM/FM radio is the perfect device for listening to those cassettes you have in your collection. Whether you re listening to books on tape or you ve just revisited a collection of your old mix tapes  this handheld stereo cassette player is perfect for you. Weighing in at only a few ounces  the SCR-75 is lightweight  portable and offers a sleek design with rubberized accents. It comes with several functions  like play  fast forward  stop  and auto stop. Listen to your favorite radio stations  stereo music  or cassette tapes with the included stereo earbuds. The unit also features a Line-out jack  so you can connect the player to home stereo system or a set of portable speakers. The unit operates on 2 x “AA” batteries (not included). Play  Fast Forward and Stop Auto Stop Detachable Belt Clip Headphone Jack Stereo Earbuds Included Line-out Jack Power: 2 x ‘AA’ (UM-3) (Not included) 120V AC Adaptor (Not included)
key_features: powered by 2 x AA batteries (not included)

items.title: Digitnow Portable Cassette Player Converter Recorder Convert Tapes To Digital Mp3 Save Into Usb Flash Drive/ No Pc Required Black
items.note: Side A saves lives. Ask Max.
items.alt_text: Black portable cassette player and converter with USB output.
items.description: Purchase Guidance There are two modes to operate this cassette tape converter ---automatic mode and manual mode: 1. In automatic mode  the device will convert your tapes into mp3 files and partition each song automatically. 2. In manual mode  you need to partition each song by press next button during recording. -Multifunctional cassette tape converter -Automatically or manually partition songs. -Stand alone  no computer required. -Plug & play. -With playback can check the recorded music on the device. -Small size  can play  convert anywhere. -One-touch convert tapes to MP3 With Rybozen cassette tape converter  you can easily convert your old cassette tapes to MP3 format and directly save into USB flash drive! Just put your tape in and play  then press record button and wait. After all songs are played  it will automatically save the mp3 files to your USB flash drive. Then turn the cassette to the other side and record it. Convert cassette tape into MP3 and directly save into USB flash drive. And you can instantly play the recorded music. This means it can be used as a music player  play music in the USB flash drive or cassette tapes. Please note: USB flash drive is not included in the package. This cassette player comes with 3.5mm earphone jack  so you can play and listen to the music through the supplied earphones. Of course you can also use your own headphones to enjoy your high quality music. Package Contents - cassette tape to mp3 converter - USB cable - Earphone - User Manual Please note: it powered by 2 AA batteries or 5V DC power adapter. AA Batteries (Not Included). DC Power Adapter(Not Included).
key_features: USB port for saving to USB flash drive

items.title: Portable Cd And Cassette Stereo Boombox
items.note: Loud enough for the cul-de-sac. The Clash approves.
items.alt_text: Portable CD and cassette stereo boombox in dark blue with a handle.
items.description: The Portable CD and Cassette Stereo Boombox is a versatile audio player that brings together classic media formats with modern technology. Enjoy your favorite CDs, cassettes, and AM/FM radio, with the flexibility of a built-in microphone and aux input for expanded playback options. Its detachable stereo speakers provide clear sound wherever you go, while the option to use batteries ensures your music is always ready, whether indoors or out.
key_features: Plays CD, CD-R, and CD-RW discs
Runs on AC power or 8 D batteries (not included)

items.title: Boombox Cassette Tape Player Recorder Fm/am Sw Radios With Bluetooth Mp3 And Karaoke.
items.note: Loud enough for the cul-de-sac. The Clash approves.
items.alt_text: Black cassette tape player radio with Bluetooth and MP3 capabilities.
items.description: Vintage Cassette Player Boombox - A Nostalgic Bluetooth-Enabled Tape Recorder for the Modern Age. Step back in time with our Vintage Cassette Player Boombox  a perfect blend of retro charm and modern functionality. This portable cassette player is not just a tape recorder; it’s a statement piece that brings the golden era of music to life. Whether you’re a collector of vintage radio gear or a music enthusiast looking to relive the analog sound  this cassette recorder is designed to deliver an authentic experience with a contemporary twist. Crafted to resemble the iconic boom box designs of the 80s  this Bluetooth boombox combines the best of both worlds. Relive the joy of playing your favorite cassette tapes while enjoying the convenience of wireless connectivity. With built-in Bluetooth  you can seamlessly stream music from your smartphone  tablet  or laptop  making it a versatile addition to your audio collection. The portable cassette player features a sturdy handle  allowing you to take your music anywhere—whether it’s a picnic in the park  a beach day  or a cozy night in. Its retro design  complete with analog knobs and a vintage-inspired speaker grille  adds a touch of nostalgia to any space. The cassette player also includes a built-in microphone for recording  making it a functional tape recorder for capturing memories or creating mixtapes. Sound quality is paramount  and this vintage radio delivers rich  warm tones that cassette enthusiasts crave. The speaker provides clear  balanced audio  while the adjustable bass and treble controls let you customize your listening experience. Whether you’re playing classic rock  jazz  or your latest playlist  this Bluetooth boombox ensures every note is heard in stunning clarity. For those who cherish the tactile experience of physical media  the cassette recorder supports standard cassette tapes. Rewind  fast-forward  and play your tapes with ease  just like the good old days. The inclusion of a 3.5mm aux input and a headphone jack further enhances its versatility  allowing you to connect external devices or enjoy private listening sessions. This portable cassette player is more than just a gadget; it’s a bridge between generations. Share the magic of cassette tapes with younger listeners or rediscover your own collection of mixtapes and albums. Its durable construction ensures it will stand the test of time  just like the music it plays. Perfect for collectors  music lovers  or anyone who appreciates the fusion of retro and modern tech  this vintage cassette player boombox is a must-have. Whether you’re using it as a tape recorder  a Bluetooth boombox  or simply a stylish vintage radio  it’s sure to turn heads and spark conversations. Bring home the Vintage Cassette Player Boombox today and experience the timeless appeal of analog music with the convenience of modern technology. Let the tapes roll and the memories flow!

items.title: Jensen Cd-785 Bluetooth Cassette/mp3/cd/radio Player, Black
items.note: Loud enough for the cul-de-sac. The Clash approves.
items.alt_text: Jensen CD-785 Bluetooth Cassette/MP3/CD/Radio Player in black with three speaker enclosures.
items.description: This Jensen CD-785 is a versatile portable stereo system that combines a CD player, cassette deck, and digital AM/FM radio. It features Bluetooth connectivity for wireless streaming from up to 33 feet away. The unit includes a top-loading CD player, a front-loading cassette player/recorder, and an auxiliary input for other media devices. The front panel offers easy-access controls, a backlit LCD, and headphone and aux jacks. It can be used as a stationary music system or portable with its fold-away handle. The detachable speakers allow for optimal sound placement. This system comes in black.
key_features: Portable stereo Bluetooth CD music system with cassette and digital AM/FM radio
Wirelessly connect your Bluetooth enabled device and stream music or any other audio content to the CD-785 from up to 33' away
Front-mounted auxiliary input jack for connecting your iPod, MP3, or other digital audio players
Station presets (20 FM and 20 AM) and digital PLL AM/FM stereo receiver

items.note: One shot, sixty seconds, no darkroom.

items.description: Step into the world of Miffy with this charming Polaroid 600 instant film camera featuring the beloved bunny and her timeless minimalist style. Dressed in a crisp white exterior with bold red accents, this camera captures the simple yet endearing appeal of Miffy’s world. Whether you're documenting everyday moments or special adventures, this camera brings the nostalgic magic of Miffy to your instant photography collection.
key_features: Original vintage analog internals with new exterior
Powered by battery in film pack

items.title: Fujifilm Instax Mini Evo Cinema 3-in-1 Hybrid Instant Camera
items.note: One shot, sixty seconds, no darkroom.
items.alt_text: Black Fujifilm Instax Mini Evo Cinema 3-in-1 Hybrid Instant Camera body view.
items.description: The Instax Mini Evo Cinema is a hybrid instant camera that also functions as a smartphone printer and a video camera. It offers 10 Eras with 10 degrees of expression to create adjustable photo and video effects, a built-in digital zoom, self-timer options, and compatibility with the Instax Mini Evo app for remote shooting and editing. It prints on Instax mini film with 318 DPI print resolution and features attachments like viewfinder, grip, and hand strap for versatile shooting. This camera blends retro-inspired design with modern digital and printing capabilities for creative storytelling.
key_features: Capture and print stunning, high-quality instant photos with exceptional image clarity.
Enjoy effortless photography with our user-friendly interface and intuitive controls.
Take your creativity anywhere; this portable instant camera is perfect for any adventure.
Experience the joy of instant prints, creating tangible memories in seconds.
Minimize film costs with efficient printing, making every shot count.
Built to last, our durable instant camera ensures reliable performance for years to come.
10 Eras Effects with 10 degrees of expression
Cine and Still video modes with up to 15 seconds clips
In-built digital zoom and self-timer options

items.note: One shot, sixty seconds, no darkroom.
items.description: Capture your memories instantly with the Polaroid Now analog instant camera, featuring an autofocus 2-lens system for sharper photos with minimal effort. This version comes in a stylish Mint colorway, blending vintage inspiration with modern features like a self-timer. It uses Polaroid i-Type or 600 film and is designed for effortless point-and-shoot operation.

items.title: Beyerdynamic Dt 270 Pro Compact Over-ear Studio Headphones
items.note: Over the ears, over the world. The safest place in Hawkins.
items.alt_text: Black Beyerdynamic DT 270 Pro Compact Studio Headphones with padded earcups and headband.
items.description: Experience professional sound with the Beyerdynamic DT 270 PRO compact studio headphones. These closed-back, over-ear headphones are designed for recording and monitoring, offering a balanced and detailed sound profile with clear highs, well-defined mids, and clean bass. They are lightweight and feature soft velour ear pads and a cushioned headband for exceptional comfort during extended listening sessions. The detachable cable can be plugged into either the left or right earcup, and an included USB-C to 3.5mm adapter allows for easy connection to modern mobile devices. Ideal for home studios, mobile setups, and instrument practice, these headphones provide reliable, studio-grade audio quality wherever you need it.
key_features: BIG ON SOUND. COMPACT IN DESIGN.
Professional sound, trusted comfort, proven quality
Compact entry into the studio headphone range
Combines balanced sound, durable construction and flexible usability
Ideal for home studios, mobile setups or practising your instrument
Professional audio quality wherever you need it
Balanced, detailed sound profile with clear highs, well-defined mids and clean bass

items.title: Meze Audio 99 Classics Closed Back Headphone
items.note: Over the ears, over the world. The safest place in Hawkins.
items.alt_text: Detachable cable and adapter for Meze Audio headphones.
items.description: Premium closed-back over-ear headphones with real wood ear cups, black leather padding, and gold hardware. The Meze Audio 99 Classics offer heirloom-quality craftsmanship and a natural seal to block ambient noise, designed for comfortable long listening sessions.

items.title: Professional Studio Dj Headphones Wired Over Ear Hifi Monitor Headset
items.note: Over the ears, over the world. The safest place in Hawkins.
items.alt_text: Brown and silver headphones with audio cables
items.description: These are professional-grade, wired, over-ear DJ headphones designed for high-fidelity audio monitoring, gaming, and general music listening. They feature powerful 50mm neodymium drivers for clear mids, deep bass, and crisp treble, alongside a built-in microphone for clear communication. The design prioritizes comfort for extended wear with soft ear cushions and an adjustable padded headband. For portability, they feature a foldable, space-saving design with rotatable ear cups. Connectivity is universal via a standard 3.5mm jack. The aesthetic combines silver metal hardware with brown faux leather accents on the headband and earcups.
key_features: HiFi Audio Clarity: Powerful 50mm neodymium drivers produce crisp treble, deep bass, and clear mids.
Built-In Microphone: Communicate clearly during calls, recordings, or multiplayer gaming.
Comfortable Fit: Soft ear cushions and an adjustable padded headband provide hours of fatigue-free listening.
Foldable & Portable: Space-saving design with a rotatable ear cup makes it easy to carry and store.
Universal Compatibility: Works with PCs, laptops, phones, gaming consoles, and studio equipment via 3.5mm jack.

The shirt features contrasting trim on the collar and sleeves, providing a classic ringer tee aesthetic. It is constructed from 4.5 oz. 100% combed ringspun cotton jersey, with Heather variations being a 93% cotton/7% polyester blend. Design details include a topstitched, ribbed collar, taped neck, and an Easy Tear label for comfort. The construction uses double-needle hemming on the sleeves and bottom hem. The primary color shown is Deep Heather with Black trim. This item is fully customizable via embroidery, with options for logo or text application, although custom products are final sale.

The jacket has a snap button closure, flap and slip pockets, and is finished with a woven label and leather patch. It is made of 100% cotton with a polyester and viscose lining.

The jacket features a button-front closure, a regular collar, two chest pockets with flaps, and two lower welt pockets. It is adorned with distinctive AllSaints branded leather and embroidered patches, including an eagle design on the left chest and other branding on the left sleeve. This jacket is designed for men and is suitable for adult wear.
